reviews.comment:
Quise comprar en el full, el día de ayer por la tarde..  la señorita que me atendió muy mal. Le pregunte si tenia trenzado me dijo que lo tenia que hacer.. cuando eso ya viene hecho envasado, y le consulte el precio y me respondió ahí dice el precio. Cuando solo sale precio con café..... muy mala la atención lamentablemente...

(Translated by Google)
I tried to buy something at the full store yesterday afternoon. The young woman who served me was very rude. I asked if they had braided coffee, and she told me I had to do it myself, even though it comes pre-braided and packaged. When I asked about the price, she replied, "It says right there." But the price is only listed with coffee... unfortunately, the service was terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlX2VLZk1nEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención! Mucho espacio. Verificar y cargar aire es gratis, mientras que en otras YPF cobran una ficha de $50

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! Plenty of space. Checking and recharging the air is free, while other YPF stations charge a $50 token.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlX2NDbmZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Completa y buen punto de encuentro antes de meterse de lleno al centro cordobés, de allí tenés el norte y este de la ciudad bien perfilado.

(Translated by Google)
A complete and good meeting point before going into the center of Cordoba, from there you have the north and east of the city well outlined.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlMVo2OGlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésimo no recomendable la manguera del surtidor no llegaba a mi auto y espere a que un patrullero se mueva de ese lugar más de 30 minutos pésimo me fui sin cargar

(Translated by Google)
Terrible, not recommended. The pump hose didn't reach my car, and I waited over 30 minutes for a patrol car to move. It was awful; I left without filling up.

reviews.comment:
Cargo habitualmente, en el último tiempo la atención del personal es muy mala. Demoran en atenderte y charlan entre ellos, se hacen chistes y demás, mientras uno debe esperar.

(Translated by Google)
I usually go there, but lately the staff's service has been terrible. They take forever to serve you and chat amongst themselves, making jokes and such, while you're stuck waiting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlMklmWC13RRAB

reviews.comment:
El servicio de aire, debería ser gratuito. O no estar pidiendo monedas, los Playistas se molestan cuando pides una moneda.. me ha  pasado con varios

(Translated by Google)
Air service should be free. Or they shouldn't have to ask for coins; the beachgoers get annoyed when you ask for money. It's happened to me with several people.
